title: narration novel_text 含禁止词应被拒

segments.novel_text: 叶尘陷入了对往事的回忆，思绪飘回到十五年前的那个雨夜，他仿佛又看到了师父的背影。

image_prompt.scene: Misty morning at a martial arts training ground with ancient stone tiles, a lone young swordsman practicing sword forms under a willow tree, morning fog swirling around practice dummies.

composition.lighting: Soft dawn light filtering through fog, cool blue-gray tones

video_prompt.action: The young swordsman executes a slow deliberate sword kata, blade cutting through mist
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Distant birdsong, wind through willow branches
